name: Dinner Set (8 persons)
description: A complete ceramic or porcelain dinner set for 8 — we're setting up a proper home together.

name: KitchenAid Stand Mixer
description: For all the baking adventures we've been planning. Any colour works!

name: Instant Pot / Pressure Cooker
description: A quality electric pressure cooker or Instant Pot for everyday South Indian cooking.

name: Coffee Machine
description: We run on filter coffee. A good drip or bean-to-cup machine would be a dream.

name: Art for the Home
description: A piece of original art — painting, print, or textile — that could live on our walls.

name: Hotel Stay / Weekend Getaway
description: A contribution towards a mini-honeymoon or weekend escape. Any amount is welcome.

name: Cutlery Set
description: A proper set of stainless steel or silver-plated cutlery for everyday use and hosting.

name: Bookshelf / Books
description: We love to read — a beautiful bookshelf, or a curated stack of books you love and think we'd love too.

name: Indoor Plants & Pots
description: We'd love to fill our home with greenery. Potted plants or a set of beautiful ceramic planters.

name: Linen Set (Bedsheets & Pillowcases)
description: High thread count cotton or linen bedsheets — king or queen size.

name: Cast Iron Cookware
description: A Lodge or Le Creuset cast iron skillet or Dutch oven for slow cooking.

name: Contribution to Our Home
description: If you'd like to give us a cash gift towards setting up our home, we'd be truly grateful. We'll put it towards something we'll use every day.
